ItacAcademyItem.Name: Stravaganti-Candia (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: On Academies in Candia/Crete, see Literature and society in Renaissance Crete, ed. David Holton (Cambridge: CUP, 1991), which suggests that Stravaganti Academy was founded in 1591.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
